title: Sqlitelogictest crash on aggregation with having statement
poc: CREATE TABLE tab1(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER);
SELECT DISTINCT + cor0.col1 / cor0.col1 col2 FROM tab1 AS cor0 GROUP BY col1 HAVING NOT NULL IN ( - col1 * cor0.col1 );
key_bug_features: Crash on aggregation with HAVING statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab2(col0 INTEGER NOT NULL, col1 FLOAT, col2 VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE tab3(colA INTEGER, colB INTEGER, colC INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
SELECT colA, SUM(colB) FROM tab3 GROUP BY colA HAVING COUNT(colC) > 1;
